title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Home Screen shows greyed-out earbud fields with disconnected status when both earbuds are in the case, and connected status with battery levels when earbuds are out of the case
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds are disconnected (not in the case, not connected via Bluetooth).
3. Place both earbuds into the charging case and close the lid.
4. Observe the Home screen of the app.
5. Verify that the Left, Right, and Case battery fields are greyed out and show only the '%' symbol (not an exact percentage number).
6. Verify that the Status field displays "disconnected" with a red indicator.
7. Verify that the earbud images on the Home screen are greyed out.
8. Remove both earbuds from the case and ensure they connect to the device.
10. Verify that the Status field now displays "connected" with a green indicator.
11. Verify that the Left, Right, and Case battery fields show exact battery percentage levels.
expected: When both earbuds are placed in the case and disconnected, the Home screen shows Left, Right, and Case fields greyed out with only the '%' symbol (not exact percentage), the Status field shows "disconnected" with a red indicator, and the earbud images are greyed out. When earbuds are connected and out of the case, the status shows "connected" with a green indicator and battery levels are displayed.
